zh.Carlton in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾卡爾頓-易-可列福藍德
zh.Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾福利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Calverly於1500年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Walter Calverley18歲，母親Isabel Elizabeth Drakes13歲。他於1545年與Elizabeth Sneyde在英國越可爾卡爾頓-易-可列福藍德結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他去世於1570年10月27日在英國越可爾卡爾福利享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Calverly于1500年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Walter Calverley18岁，母亲Isabel Elizabeth Drakes13岁。他于1545年与Elizabeth Sneyde在英国越可爾卡爾頓-易-可列福藍德结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他去世于1570年10月27日在英国越可爾卡爾福利享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Calverly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Calverley
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Calverly was born in 1500, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Calverley, was 18 and his mother, Isabel Elizabeth Drakes, was 13. He married Elizabeth Sneyde in 1545, in Carlton-in-Cleveland, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 10 daughters. He died on 27 October 1570, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Calverly est né en 1500, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Calverley, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Isabel Elizabeth Drakes, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Sneyde en 1545, à Carlton-in-Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 10 filles. Il est décédé le 27 octobre 1570, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Calverly 1500 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Calverley 18 und seine Mutter Isabel Elizabeth Drakes 13. Er hat 1545 in Carlton-in-Cleveland, Yorkshire, England Elizabeth Sneyde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Oktober 1570 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Calverley, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Calverly è nato il nel 1500 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter Calverley, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Elizabeth Drakes, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Sneyde nel 1545, nel Carlton-in-Cleveland, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 10 figlie. Morì il 27 ottobre 1570, nel Calverley, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Calverlyが1500年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Walter Calverleyは18歳，母Isabel Elizabeth Drakesは13歳であった。1545年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカールトン-イン-クレベランドでElizabeth Sneydeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼は1570年10月27日にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Calverly(이)가 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Calverley(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Elizabeth Drakes(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1545년 영국 요르크실르 칼토-이-클벨랜드에서 Elizabeth Sneyde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1570년 10월 27일 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Calverly nasceu em 1500, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Calverley, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Elizabeth Drakes, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Sneyde em 1545, em Carlton-in-Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 10 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1570, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Calverly родился в 1500 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Calverley было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Elizabeth Drakes, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Sneyde в 1545 г. в местности карлтон-ин-кливеланд, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Он умер 27 октября 1570 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Calverly nació en 1500, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter Calverley, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Isabel Elizabeth Drakes, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Sneyde en 1545, en Carlton-in-Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1570, en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
